twoFactor.title: Ob-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Sau 6 tus lej code los ntawm koj lub authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Sau ib qho ntawm koj cov lej rov qab los kos npe rau hauv

twoFactor.submit: Txheeb xyuas thiab Kos npe rau hauv
twoFactor.helpText: Muaj teeb meem? Hu rau kev txhawb nqa kom tau kev pab.

setup.welcome: Zoo siab txais tos rau Horizon Tech, {{name}}!

setup.labDescription: Kuv sawv cev rau lub chaw kuaj mob lossis chaw kuaj mob
setup.individualDescription: Kuv yog ib tus kws kho mob lossis tus kws tshawb fawb

success.retry: Tsis tau txais email? Rov sim dua
